issue: My computer won't turn on and the power light is not blinking
resolution: Check power cable connections, test with different outlet, inspect power supply unit, check for blown fuse in plug

issue: Cannot connect to WiFi network, says authentication failed
resolution: Forget network and reconnect, verify password, check if MAC filtering is enabled on router, flush DNS cache

issue: Blue screen of death BSOD with error SYSTEM_SERVICE_EXCEPTION
resolution: Boot into safe mode, run sfc /scannow, check recent driver updates, run memory diagnostic, check event viewer logs

issue: Outlook not receiving emails, stuck at loading profile
resolution: Repair Office installation, delete OST file, recreate mail profile, check Exchange connectivity, disable add-ins

issue: Computer running extremely slow, high CPU usage at 100%
resolution: Check Task Manager for resource-hogging processes, run malware scan, disable startup programs, check for Windows updates running in background, increase virtual memory

issue: Printer not found on network, cannot print documents
resolution: Restart print spooler service, reinstall printer drivers, check IP address of printer, ensure printer is on same subnet

issue: VPN disconnects every few minutes and cannot stay connected
resolution: Update VPN client, check firewall rules, try different VPN protocol, contact network admin for server-side logs, check MTU settings
commands: netsh interface ipv4 set subinterface 'Ethernet' mtu=1400 store=persistent

issue: User forgot Windows login password and cannot access their account
resolution: Use admin account to reset password via Active Directory, or use local admin account, boot from recovery media if standalone machine

issue: Hard drive making clicking noise and files are not accessible
resolution: Immediately backup accessible data, run SMART diagnostic, do not attempt to repair — replace drive, escalate to data recovery if critical data lost

issue: Application keeps crashing with out of memory error
resolution: Increase RAM or virtual memory, close background applications, check for memory leaks, update or reinstall the application
